headline: PLATINUM EQUITY TO SELL HEAT CONTROLLER TO LENNOX
summary: Platinum Equity today announced that it has signed a definitive agreement to sell Heat Controller, a leading HVAC equipment supplier, to Lennox (NYSE: LII). Financial terms of the transaction were not disclosed.

raw.headline: PLATINUM EQUITY TO SELL HEAT CONTROLLER TO LENNOX
raw.summary: Platinum Equity today announced that it has signed a definitive agreement to sell Heat Controller, a leading HVAC equipment supplier, to Lennox (NYSE: LII). Financial terms of the transaction were not disclosed.

headline: Lennox Signs Agreement to Acquire Heat Controller, Expanding Portfolio with Trusted Comfort-Aire and Century Brands
summary: Lennox (NYSE: LII), a leader in energy-efficient building and home comfort solutions, announced today that it has signed a definitive agreement to acquire Heat Controller, a leading HVAC equipment supplier. Heat Controller serves distributors across North America through its established Comfort-Aire and Century brands.
